title: NGS Library Prep for Targeted Sequencing of DNA Methylation Patterns in Cell-Free DNA
author: Opentrons

steps.title: is chemically treated to convert unmethylated...
steps.instruction: is chemically treated to convert unmethylated cytosine (C to T) in order to reveal patterns of methylated cytosine by DNA sequencing (methylated cytosine is protected and remains unchanged). This bisulfite conversion is followed by bead-clean up, elution, and transfer of the eluate to a fresh PCR plate. Links: * [Part

steps.title: Pooling](http://protocols
steps.instruction: Pooling](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/76ba23-pooling) With this protocol, your robot will use reagents from the Zymoresearch EZ DNA Methylation-Gold Kit [Zymoresearch EZ DNA Methylation-Gold Kit](https://www.zymoresearch.com/collections/ez-dna-methylation-gold-kits) to perform the custom steps (DNA extraction, Bisulfite Conversion, PCR1, PCR2, Pooling) detailed in the HKG SOP.[HKG SOP](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2021-03-04/vw23kchHKG%20Standard%20Operating%20Procedure%20for%20DNA%20extraction%20Targeted%20next%20generation%20sequencing%20and%20.xlsx). This is part 2 of the protocol: Bisulfite Conversion. This step performs the bisulfite conversion and bead-clean up steps using the output samples from step 1 (DNA extraction). After the steps carried out in this protocol (part 2), proceed with part

steps.title: Distribute cell-free DNA and CT conversion...
steps.instruction: Distribute cell-free DNA and CT conversion buffer to the PCR plate.

steps.title: Pause for the following steps (OT-2...
steps.instruction: Pause for the following steps (OT-2 deck lights will signal pauses):

steps.title: Desulphonation, bead clean up, elute and...
steps.instruction: Desulphonation, bead clean up, elute and transfer eluate to fresh PCR plate.
